settings.title: A Spring Renewal Day to Shake Off Winter
settings.excerpt: Three treatments, lunch, and a quiet afternoon, offered through May only.
settings.body:
Winter leaves its mark, so we have put together a half-day package to help you reset. It is on offer at Velvet Touch through the end of May.

The idea came from how many people arrive in spring looking a little worn out, with dry skin and shoulders up around their ears. One single treatment helps, but a slow morning of several does something deeper.

What the day includes

The day includes a body scrub, a massage, and a facial, with a light lunch and tea in between. You arrive in the morning and drift out in the early afternoon, unhurried.

The order is arranged so each step leads naturally into the next:

  • A body scrub first, to clear away the dryness winter leaves behind.
  • A massage to ease the tension that builds in the cold months.
  • A facial to finish, when your skin is most ready for it.

A treat or a gift

It makes a thoughtful gift as much as a treat for yourself. We can arrange it as a gift voucher if you would rather let someone choose their own date.

Spaces are limited each week, so book ahead if a particular date matters. We keep the numbers low so the afternoon stays calm rather than busy, which is rather the point.
